title: chionochloa lanea
intro: Chionochloa lanea, also known as New Zealand tussock grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chionochloa lanea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. It is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
